actionCalls.name: Log_Close_All_Open_Tasks_Error
actionCalls.label: Log Close All Open Tasks Error

value.stringValue: Record Trigger - Patient Document Approved/Rejected Flow Started

actionCalls.name: Log_Get_Patient_Agreement_Configuration_Error
actionCalls.label: Log Get Patient Agreement Configuration Error

actionCalls.name: Log_Get_Rejected_Email_Template_Error
actionCalls.label: Log Get Rejected Email Template Error

actionCalls.name: Log_Get_Rejected_Email_Template_Error_Patient_Portal
actionCalls.label: Log Get Rejected Email Template Error Patient Portal

value.stringValue: Error Getting Rejected Email Template Patient Portal
No Content document file found. Posting to Chatter
Patient not synced with drChrono. Posting to Chatter
Patient Agreement Status not Approved or Rejected, end Flow

actionCalls.name: Log_Rejected_Email_template_selected_not_synced
actionCalls.label: Log Rejected Email template selected not synced

value.stringValue: Patient synced with drChrono. Calling Autolaunch - Send Patient Agreements to Patient" flow
Updated Patient Agreement and sent email to client

assignments.name: Add_Patient_Agreement_to_a_Text_Collection
assignments.label: Add Patient Agreement to a Text Collection

assignments.name: Set_Email_Template_Id_Rejected_Non_Patient_Portal
assignments.label: Set Email Template Id - Rejected - Non Patient Portal

assignments.name: Set_Email_Template_Id_Rejected_Patient_Portal
assignments.label: Set Email Template Id - Rejected - Patient Portal

decisions.name: Did_We_Find_a_Content_Document_File
decisions.label: Did We Find a Content Document File

decisions.description: Check if we need to run the sync again. This is necessary for the cases when the Patient and Patient agreements are created at the same time so the patient did not have time to sync to drChrono
decisions.name: Do_we_need_to_try_document_sync_again
decisions.label: Do we need to try document sync again

decisions.name: Is_Patient_Synced_to_Patient_Portal
decisions.label: Is Patient Synced to Patient Portal
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Patient is Not Synced to Patient Portal

rules.name: Patient_is_Synced_to_Patient_Portal
rules.label: Patient is Synced to Patient Portal

decisions.name: What_is_the_Patient_Agreement_Status
decisions.label: What is the Patient Agreement Status

Flow.description: This flow will automatically close out any open tasks that was created by this Patient Agreement and either send the document to the EHR or send another document to the patient because it was rejected.
Flow.label: Record Trigger - Patient Document Approved/Rejected

recordLookups.name: Get_Rejected_Email_Template_Non_Patient_Portal
recordLookups.label: Get Rejected Email Template - Non Patient Portal

recordLookups.name: Get_Rejected_Email_Template_Patient_Portal
recordLookups.label: Get Rejected Email Template - Patient Portal

subflows.name: Run_Patient_Agreement_Upload_Files_to_EHR
subflows.label: Run - Patient Agreement - Upload Files to EHR

subflows.description: This will take the Patient Agreement Configuration records and the account and send to the external system.
subflows.name: Send_To_External_System
subflows.label: Send To External System

variables.description: Stores the reason (Approval or Rejection) for Logging
variables.name: txt_EmailReason
